label: Conscientiousness
description: Tendency toward careful reliable goal-directed behavior

label: Agreeableness
description: Tendency toward cooperativeness and interpersonal accommodation

label: Working Memory
description: Capacity for maintaining and manipulating task-relevant information

label: Spatial Skill
description: Ability to reason about layout distance placement and movement constraints

label: Cognitive Flexibility
description: Tendency to revise plans and shift strategies under changing demands

label: Trust Bias
description: Tendency to trust teammate information and shared artifacts

label: Fatigue
description: Temporary reduction in speed persistence and accuracy

label: Stress
description: Temporary increase in urgency with possible degradation in communication and accuracy
